objective: Compare Gankyil-A passive phase-management behavior against the baseline separator path under bounded GH-BENCH-A0 conditions.
comparison_plan: A-side baseline separator path versus B-side Gankyil-A phase-management path with comparable water, power, duration, sensor placement, and venting.
safety_notes: Gankyil-A is non-pressurized, removable, and used only for bounded phase-management comparison.
